articles.title: Bihar’s Piyush Raj scripts history with U20 AsianAthletics Championships bronze
articles.description: In a remarkable feat, Piyush Raj made history as Bihar's inaugural U20 Asian Athletics Championships medalist, clinching bronze in the thrilling men's 4x400m relay. Rising from previous setbacks, the 19-year-old sprinted with determination in the opening leg, finally realizing his dream of standing on an international podium. His next goal? Aiming for glory at the U20 World Athletics Championships.

articles.title: WATCH: Police Take Action As RCB Fan Celebrations Turn Chaotic After IPL 2026 Triumph
articles.description:
RCB IPL 2026 Title Celebration Chaos: Royal Challengers Bengaluru's successful defence of their IPL title triggered widespread celebrations, with fans pouring onto the streets to mark the franchise's latest triumph. However, amid the jubilant scenes, videos emerging on social media have highlighted instances of overcrowding and public disorder during the celebrations. One video that has gone viral online was shared originally on Instagram by the account festival_vlogs_hyderabad. The footage appears to show police personnel intervening after large groups of fans gathered on public roads.

🚨RCB fans received belt treatment from Telangana Police🚨 pic.twitter.com/hruscDt1gS

— sirron tweets💛 (@SirronOfficial) June 1, 2026

Officers can be seen using batons to disperse sections of the crowd as authorities attempted to restore order.

The scale of the celebrations reflects RCB's immense popularity, but it has also raised concerns about maintaining order when thousands of supporters gather spontaneously.

Also Check || WATCH: Krunal Pandya Celebrates IPL 2026 Glory With Adorable Father-Son Moment

No RCB Trophy Parade Planned This Time?

RCB's maiden IPL title in 2025 ended a wait of nearly two decades but was followed by tragedy when a stampede during the team's victory celebrations resulted in the deaths of 11 fans.

The incident led to significant scrutiny and impacted operations at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium before the venue was eventually cleared to host IPL 2026 matches.

Following this year's triumph, the franchise shared a message on social media that appears to suggest there will be no public trophy parade.

"What a night. What a feeling. To every member of the RCB nation, congratulations. This is YOUR win. As the celebrations begin, let's be responsible. The best way to celebrate is with your loved ones. Relive the memories, and enjoy this special moment from the comfort of home. We'll see you in the stadium next year, 12th Man Army. Until then, spread the joy and keep supporting us. #PlayBold #????RCB #IPL2026,"

The statement has been widely interpreted as an indication that RCB do not plan to hold a large-scale public celebration at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium following their latest title-winning campaign.

articles.title: Ahmedabad Weather Update: What Happens If RCB vs GT IPL 2026 Final Is Washed Out?
articles.description:
The grand finale of IPL 2026 pits the defending champions, Royal Challengers Bengaluru, against the highly consistent Gujarat Titans at Ahmedabad's Narendra Modi Stadium. While current weather forecasts look highly promising with only a minor chance of rain and partial cloud cover, tournament organizers are fully prepared for any sudden weather disruptions.

If rain does gatecrash the highly anticipated Sunday blockbuster, the IPL has structured precise protocols - ranging from extra time allocations to league standings - to determine the ultimate champion.

Also Read | IPL 2026 Prize Money: How Much Winners, Runners-up And Players Will Earn

Scenario 1: Delays and Shortened Matches on Sunday (May 31)

The primary objective is to complete a full 20-overs-a-side match on the scheduled day. If that isn't possible due to rain, officials will utilize the following measures:

Extra Time Allowance: Up to 120 extra minutes are built into the playing conditions to accommodate ground drying and rain delays without losing overs. If time continues to run out, the match will be cut down to a minimum of 5 overs per side to establish a valid result under the DLS method.

Last Resort Super Over: If the ground is only fit for play very late in the night, a standalone Super Over can be played to decide the winner. The absolute cutoff time to commence a Super Over on Sunday night is 1:20 AM IST (Monday).

Scenario 2: Shifting to Reserve Day (Monday, June 1)

Unlike the standard playoff matches, IPL Final is equipped with an official Reserve Day. If not even a 5-over match or a Super Over can be completed on Sunday, the game moves to Monday.

A Continuation, Not a Restart: The final will resume on Monday from the exact delivery where it was stopped on Sunday. The scoreboards, remaining overs, and toss results carry over perfectly.

Fresh Start Exceptions: If the match is completely abandoned on Sunday without even a single ball being bowled, a fresh 20-over game will begin on Monday.

Scenario 3: What if Both Days are Completely Washed Out?

In the highly unlikely event that torrential rain forces a total washout on both Sunday and Monday, making even a Super Over impossible, the title winner is determined by historical regular-season dominance.

The Ultimate Tie-Breaker Rule: If no play is possible on either the scheduled match day or the reserve day, Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) will be crowned the IPL 2026 Champions. This outcome is dictated by tournament rules, which award the trophy to the finalist that finished higher on the official points table during the league stage. Having topped or placed higher than GT in the regular season, RCB secures the advantage.
